ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(Status, "Active"), TODAY() < Sales_Start_Date__c ), AND( ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(Status, "Active"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status), "Approved")) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can only change the Status to 'Active' if the current Status is 'Approved' and today's date is after the Sales Start Date.
